title: Simple Voice Distance
description: With SimpleVoiceDistance, players can now cycle between Whisper, Normal, and Shout modes with a single key press—perfect for roleplay servers!
body:
### **🔊SimpleVoice Distance** With SimpleVoice Distance, players can now cycle between Whisper, Normal, call and Shout modes with a single key press—perfect for roleplay servers! (That’s just an addon for Simple Voice Chat.) ### **▶️ Overview** SimpleVoiceDistance adds three voice modes (Whisper, Normal, Shout), each of which can be fully configured server‑side. Players adjust their speaking range on the fly via key bind—ideal for roleplay. ### **✨ Features** * Whisper: Short range for private conversations * Normal: Default range for everyday chat * Call: Medium range for calling out to nearby players * Shout: Long range for announcements and large gatherings * Server‑side configuration: Easily tweak each mode’s range in simplevoicedistance-server.toml * Visual feedback: Colorful particles display your current voice range in‑game * Quick key‑press switching: Switch voice modes forward or backward instantly with one key—perfect for RP scenarios
 ### **📣 Support & Feedback** **Report bugs, suggest features, or ask questions on: GitHub** **Join our Discord: [Discord](https://discord.gg/ahMcRGYwPw)**
